nodes.name: Every 6 hours
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours to check for patients at risk of drop-off.

nodes.name: Fetch at-risk patients
nodes.notes:
Fetches patients flagged as churnRisk=true from the StrydeOS pipeline.
The pipeline sets churnRisk when: >14 days since last session, no future appointment, 2+ sessions completed.

nodes.name: Trigger rebooking sequence
nodes.notes:
Fires the rebooking_prompt comms sequence for each at-risk patient.
The StrydeOS app handles deduplication (won't re-send within 7 days).

nodes.name: Red risk only
nodes.notes: Red risk patients (>28 days) get a Slack/email alert to the clinic owner in addition to the patient SMS.

nodes.name: Slack alert (owner)
nodes.notes:
Optional: sends a Slack message to the clinic owner's workspace.
Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n env vars (Slack → Incoming Webhooks → Create new webhook).

meta.description:
Every 6 hours: identifies patients who haven't rebooked in >14 days and flags them as drop-off risk (Pulse module).

Amber risk (14–28 days): triggers rebooking_prompt SMS sequence
Red risk (>28 days): same + optional Slack alert to clinic owner

Required env vars:
  APP_URL                  — StrydeOS Vercel URL
  RETELL_CLINIC_ID         — Firestore clinic document ID
  N8N_COMMS_WEBHOOK_SECRET — shared auth secret
  SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL        — optional, for owner alerts
